case_title: ANTHONY G CHERRY JR. VS. DIVVY HOMES

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE:REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHERRY JR., ANTHONY G
CORRESPONDENCE RECEIVED AND FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHERRY JR., ANTHONY G
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHERRY JR., ANTHONY G

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-22-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-22-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF ANTHONY G. CHERRY JR. IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT DIVVY HOMES IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,184.35 FILED BY CHERRY JR., ANTHONY G AS TO DEFENDANT DIVVY HOMES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-27-2023 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF ANTHONY G. CHERRY JR. IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT DIVVY HOMES IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT DOES NOT APPEAR TO BE THE PROPERTY OWNER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM PLAINTIFF GRANTED**

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-27-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JAN-22-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ANTHONY CHERRY IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT DIVVY HOMES IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY KAYLIN CALLEN VIA UNAUTHORIZED ZOOM APPEARANCE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE, UPON QUESTIONING THE DEFENDANT, THE SERVICE ON THE DEFENDANT WAS IMPROPERLY DONE. DEFENDANT WILL NOT WAIVE AND REQUESTS TO BE PROPERLY SERVED. PLAINITIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $136.98 SERVED DEC-20-2023, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DIVVY HOMES
